name: wheremytokens-win
description: Windows system tray app for monitoring Claude Code, Codex, and Antigravity token usage in real time

scripts.build: node scripts/make-icons.mjs && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.test: npm run build:main && node --test scripts/session-metadata.test.mjs scripts/git-stats-keys.test.mjs scripts/git-stats-daily.test.mjs scripts/git-output-ledger.test.mjs scripts/refresh-scheduler.test.mjs scripts/state-readiness.test.mjs scripts/startup-state-snapshot.test.mjs scripts/integration.test.mjs scripts/jsonl-summary.test.mjs scripts/provider-settings.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-process-finder.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-ls-client.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-quota-parser.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-session-parser.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-gm-parser.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-usage-cache-store.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-gm-tracker.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-provider-integration.test.mjs scripts/antigravity-privacy.test.mjs scripts/generic-provider-single-scan.test.mjs scripts/compact-widget-sizing.test.mjs scripts/quota-display-groups.test.mjs scripts/provider-registry.test.mjs scripts/provider-state-assembly.test.mjs scripts/provider-state-runtime.test.mjs scripts/provider-usage-shape.test.mjs scripts/usage-alert-manager.test.mjs scripts/usage-ledger-aggregates.test.mjs scripts/usage-ledger-store.test.mjs scripts/usage-ledger-importer.test.mjs scripts/usage-ledger-generic-ingest.test.mjs scripts/usage-ledger-usage.test.mjs scripts/usage-ledger-state.test.mjs scripts/trend-section.test.mjs scripts/main-section-visibility.test.mjs scripts/usage-ledger-rebuild-ui.test.mjs scripts/rate-limit-fetcher.test.mjs scripts/oauth-refresh.test.mjs scripts/codex-usage-fetcher.test.mjs scripts/stability-regressions.test.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently "tsc -w" "wait-on dist/main/index.js && npm run build:renderer && electron ."

author: jeongwook
